resources.string: Ready. Tell me what you want to do
Tell Baozi what you want to do…
Order a tasty burger nearby for me
Post my latest photo to Weibo
I want to watch trending videos on Bilibili
Order a fruit pizza on Meituan
Open NetEase Cloud Music and play daily recommendations
Send a message to my recent contact saying I\'m busy
Post to Xiaohongshu with today\'s good mood
Check Sanya travel guide with Xiaomei
Enable power saving mode and lower brightness
Open camera and take a photo
Open exercise tracking and start running
Call a taxi to the nearest subway station
Turn on the living room light
Set a meeting reminder for tomorrow at 9 AM
Set an alarm for tomorrow at 7 AM
Send a WeChat message to Mom saying I\'m home
Records will appear here after executing tasks
Are you sure you want to delete this record?
App needs to restart for language change to take effect
Learn how to install and configure Shizuku
Learn why overlay permission is needed
Please start Shizuku and grant permission

Download Shizuku from Google Play or GitHub

• Google Play: Search "Shizuku"
• GitHub: github.com/RikkaApps/Shizuku

Open Shizuku and choose a startup method:

• Wireless debugging (recommended): Requires Android 11+, enable wireless debugging in developer options
• Connect to computer: Start via ADB command
Find Baozi Autopilot in Shizuku\'s \"App Management\" and click authorize
After authorization, return to Baozi. The status card will show \"Shizuku Connected\"
Baozi needs to display an overlay during task execution to:
Provide a stop button to interrupt tasks anytime
Display status information above other apps
1. You\'ll be prompted when executing a task\n2. Or go to: Settings > Apps > Baozi > Overlay permission\n3. Enable \"Allow display over other apps\"
The overlay is only shown during task execution and does not collect any personal information. It automatically disappears after the task is complete.
Baozi is an intelligent automation assistant\nthat helps you operate your phone to complete various tasks
Based on advanced vision-language models,\nBaozi can understand screen content and make intelligent decisions
Just describe what you want to do in natural language,\nand Baozi will automatically complete it for you
Automatically stops when encountering sensitive pages\n(like payments, passwords) to protect your account
Alian accessibility service for getting screen element info and performing automation
Records will appear here after starting a conversation
Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?
Voice input requires microphone permission to work properly.
Type a message or use voice to start conversation
Are you sure you want to delete this record?
Enter text model name (for text-only chat)
Enter the full Backend server address
Set the maximum steps for Agent single task. More steps allow more complex tasks but consume more tokens.
Click \"Fetch from API\" to load models
Root mode allows the app to use advanced system privileges.
Root privileges may cause system instability
Improper operations may damage device data
Make sure you understand the risks of Root privileges
Only enable this option when you fully understand the risks and need advanced features.
This option allows AI to execute su -c commands, meaning AI can run any shell command with Root privileges.
AI may execute dangerous system commands
May cause data loss or system damage
May be exploited by malicious instructions
Strongly recommended: Only use in fully controlled test environments and disable immediately after use.
Please grant screen recording permission in settings and try again.
Are you sure you want to logout? You\'ll need to login again to use Alian features.
Alian needs to display overlay during task execution to:
Provide stop button to interrupt tasks anytime
Display status information above other apps
1. You\'ll be prompted when executing a task\n2. Or go to: Settings > Apps > Alian > Overlay permission\n3. Enable \"Allow display over other apps\"
The overlay is only shown during task execution and does not collect any personal information. It automatically disappears after the task is complete.
What can I help you today?
Voice input and voice call features require microphone permission to work properly.
Video call feature requires camera permission to work properly.
Display background running notifications to prevent the app from being killed by the system.
Overlay interface requires overlay permission to display properly.
Automation features require accessibility service permission to control other apps.
Automation features require screen recording permission to capture screen content for visual recognition.\n\nNote: This permission is only used for screenshots, not for recording video or audio.

Shizuku is an efficient device control tool that requires installing and authorizing the Shizuku App.

Authorization steps:
1. Make sure Shizuku App is installed
2. Authorize via ADB (recommended) or Root
3. Grant Alian permission in Shizuku App
Tell me what you want to do
Please grant screen recording permission first
Please connect Shizuku or enable accessibility service first
Click the button below to start voice call
Configure device controller execution strategy and performance
Enabled (Manager plans once, Executor handles rest)

• Optimize Mode: Skip unnecessary Manager/Reflector calls to reduce VLM calls and speed up execution
• Batch Execution Mode: AI can return multiple non-conflicting operations at once, reducing VLM calls
• ReactOnly Mode: Manager plans only at the start, Executor handles the rest, greatly reducing VLM calls
• ChatAgent Mode: Supports voice interrupt and real-time interaction during execution
• Max Steps: Sets the upper limit of operations for a single Agent task
Requires Shizuku running with Root privileges
Enabled, bot responses support voice playback
Click speaker icon next to message to play
Auto-stop TTS when user speaks during playback
Enable AEC for more precise voice interrupt
Enable streaming LLM + streaming TTS for lower latency
Enabled, help us improve the app
Are you sure you want to delete all log files?
Learn how to install and configure Shizuku
Learn why overlay permission is needed
Welcome back, please login to your account
Select how the device controller executes
Fallback method when preferred method is unavailable
Enable screenshot cache to improve performance
Accessibility controller needs screen recording permission to capture screenshots
Note: Shizuku controller does not need this permission
The selected execution strategy requires accessibility service to work properly.
Please enable \"Alian\" accessibility service in system settings.
The selected execution strategy requires screen recording permission to capture screenshots.
After granting this permission, the accessibility controller can capture screen content for visual recognition.
The selected execution strategy requires Shizuku permission to work properly.
Shizuku is an efficient device control tool that requires installing and authorizing Shizuku App.

Authorization steps:
1. Make sure Shizuku App is installed
2. Authorize via ADB (recommended) or Root
3. Grant Alian permission in Shizuku App
Accessibility service not enabled, please go to settings to enable
Click avatar or button to change
Very Fast - Suitable for quick browsing
Set the system prompt for voice calls to define AI\'s role and behavior.
Set the system prompt for video calls to define AI\'s role and behavior.
Are you sure you want to delete this template?
When you perform repetitive tasks, the system will automatically learn and generate flow templates to help improve efficiency
